name: Mushroom Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut mushrooms into quarters.
2. Heat oil in a skillet.
3. Add mushrooms, onion, sage, marjoram, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until the vegetables are tender.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Cube the bread and add it; toss well to mix everything together.
6. Pour the eggs over the stuffing and toss again.
7. Makes 12-14 cups, enough to stuff a turkey weighing 14 lbs (allowing for 1 cup of stuffing per pound of turkey).
